name: age
definition: Age of animal that carries tag, the units are specified in 'Age units'.

name: age_unit
definition: Units of age.

name: anaesthetic
definition: Name of anaesthetic used if applicable.

name: anaesthetic_concentration
definition: Concentration of anaesthetic.

name: anaesthetic_concentration_in_recirculation
definition: Concentration of anaesthetic in recirculation bath.

name: animal_label
definition: Identification code that uniquely identifies each animal, as specified by the researcher.

name: animal_nickname
definition: Nickname given to the tagged animal.

name: animal_project_code
definition: Animal project code; predefined options. Check your dashboard (https://www.lifewatch.be/etn/dashboard); new project names can only be added by administrators

name: aphia_id
definition: The Aphia ID linked to the scientific name. The Aphia ID can be found at http://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=webservice

name: buffer
definition: Name of buffer used if applicable.

name: buffer_concentration_in_anaesthetic
definition: Concentration of buffer in anaesthetic.

name: buffer_concentration_in_recirculation
definition: Concentration of buffer in recirculation bath.

name: capture_date_time
definition: Date and time that animal was caught, in 24h UTC. Datetime fields should follow the ISO-8601 format.

name: capture_depth
definition: Water depth at which the animal was caught.

name: capture_latitude
definition: Latitude of capture location. Leave blank if same as release location. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

name: capture_location
definition: Name of capture location. Please refer to a specific nearby point of land, town, island, or body of water that uniquely identifies this tagging location. Okay to leave blank if same as release location.

name: capture_longitude
definition: Longitude of capture location. Leave blank if same as release location. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

name: capture_method
definition: Name of the method and materials used to capture animal.

name: capture_temperature_change
definition: Difference between water temperature of the system where the fish was caught and the water temperature of the holding reservoir.

name: comments
definition: Any comments deemed to have scientific relevance by the tagger.

name: common_name
definition: The species' common English name.

name: dissolved_oxygen
definition: This measure is the lowest oxygen level the fish will experience during the surgery.

name: dna_sample
definition: Indicates whether the animal that carries the acoustic tag is also sampled for DNA.

name: holding_temperature
definition: This measure is the highest or lowest water bath temperature the fish will experience during holding (depends if surgical water temperatures are increasing or decreasing relative to initial water temperature reading). For example, if tagging is being cond

name: length1
definition: Length of animal that carries tag, depending on 'Length type', in units specified in 'Length units'.

name: length1_type
definition: Specify type of length recorded (e.g. hood length, fork length, standard length, etc.).

name: length1_unit
definition: Units of length.

name: length2
definition: Secondary length measurement, depending on 'Length2 type', in units specified in 'Length2 units'.

name: length2_type
definition: Specify type of secondary size measurement (e.g. width).

name: length2_unit
definition: Units of secondary length.

name: length3
definition: Tertiary length measurement, depending on 'Length3 type', in units specified in 'Length3 units'.

name: length3_type
definition: Specify type of tertiary size measurement (e.g. width).

name: length3_unit
definition: Units of tertiary length.

name: length4
definition: Quaternary length measurement, depending on 'Length4 type', in units specified in 'Length4 units'.

name: length4_type
definition: Specify type of quaternary size measurement (e.g. width).

name: length4_unit
definition: Units of quaternary length.

name: life_stage
definition: Life stage of animal. This will depend on the species being studied and can be a standard code used for that species, a description, or both.

name: person_id
definition: ID linked to the person conducting tagging

name: pit_tag_number
definition: PIT tag serial number

name: post_surgery_holding_period
definition: Time the animal is held after surgery until release.

name: pre_surgery_holding_period
definition: Time that animal is held prior to surgery.

name: recapture_date_time
definition: If applicable, date of recapture of the tagged animal.

name: recapture_description
definition: Description of recapture

name: recapture_latitude
definition: Latitude of recapture location

name: recapture_location
definition: Name of recapture location

name: recapture_longitude
definition: Longitude of recapture location

name: release_date_time
definition: Date and time that tagged animal was released, in UTC.

name: release_latitude
definition: Latitude of release location. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

name: release_location
definition: Name of release location. Please refer to a specific nearby point of land, town, island, or body of water that uniquely identifies this tagging location.

name: release_longitude
definition: Longitude of release location. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

name: scientific_name
definition: Scientific name of animal that carries the tag.

name: sedative
definition: Name of sedative used if applicable.

name: sedative_concentration
definition: Concentration of sedative.

name: sensor_id_code
definition: Tag sensor id code, only required when adding sensor settings in the metadata

name: sex
definition: Sex of animal. "M" or "F". Can enter unknown ("U").

name: stock
definition: Water body of origin. Can enter unknown or not applicable.

name: surgery_date_time
definition: Date that surgery was conducted. Date fields should follow the ISO-8601 format.

name: surgery_latitude
definition: Latitude of surgery location. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

name: surgery_location
definition: Short name of surgery location (i.e. hatchery name).

name: surgery_longitude
definition: Longitude of surgery location. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

name: tag_context
definition: context of tag

name: tag_end_date
definition: Estimated date at which a tag will stop transmitting. This date is calculated automatically as the (Animals/Utc release date time) + (Tags/Estimated lifetime). When a tag was previously used in another animal for a certain period, this is incorporated

name: tag_id
definition: Select a tag. A tag code space will only appear here after adding the tag metadata in the tab 'Tags'.

name: tag_serial_number
definition: Tag serial number. If your animal is double tagged, add the serial numbers of both tags, separated by a comma.

name: tagger
definition: Person conducting tagging

name: tagging_methodology
definition: Describe method and materials used to attach tag to animal.
example: inserted into abdominal cavity through midventral line incision, closed using 2 polydioxanone monofilament sutures.

name: tagging_type
definition: Indicates how tag was attached to animal (e.g. "internal", "external", "oral", "gastric", "subcutaneous", etc.).

name: treatment_type
definition: Contains a designation of treatment group as appropriate for the particular study. Researchers will have to contact the authors directly for definitions. Try to make these as clear as possible (e.g. use Control instead of C, Lake release instead of Lake).

name: weight
definition: Weight of animal that carries tag, in units specified in 'Weight units'.

name: weight_unit
definition: Units of weight.

name: wild_or_hatchery
definition: Origin of animal that carries the tag.  Enter "wild", "hatchery" or "unknown".

name: ar_battery_installation_date
definition: Date when the acoustic release was fitted with fresh batteries, in 24-hour UTC format.

name: ar_confirm
definition: Did the acoustic release report a confirmed release? Yes or no.

name: arraylocationno
definition: arrayLocationNo

name: arrayname
definition: The Name of the array to which the deployment belogs.

name: battery_estimated_end_date
definition: Estimated date at which receiver will stop recording. This date is calculated automatically from (Deployments/Battery install date) and (Receivers/Expected battery life).

name: battery_installation_date
definition: Date when the receiver was fitted with fresh batteries.

name: battery_overwrite_end_date
definition: manual entered end date, that overwrites the system generated one

name: bottom_depth
definition: Depth at deployment location as recorded by the vessel's depth sounder.

name: check_complete_time
definition: A check of the equipment's function should be performed post-deployment when possible. This field describes the time at which this check is complete.

name: comments
definition: Any comments deemed to have scientific relevance by the tagger.

name: deploy_date_time
definition: Date and time that the equipment was deployed, in 24-hour UTC. Corresponds to the time of the captured waypoint. Datetime fields should follow the ISO-8601 format (e.g. 2017-01-01T12:07:23Z)

name: deploy_depth
definition: Depth of the instrument.

name: deploy_latitude
definition: Latitude of the actual deployment location, in decimal degrees. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

name: deploy_longitude
definition: Longitude of the actual deployment location, in decimal degrees. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

name: distancetomouth
definition: The distance (in kilometers) from the deployment location to the river mouth.

name: download_date_time
definition: Date and time that data were downloaded, in 24-hour UTC.

name: download_file_name
definition: Were data downloaded? Yes or no. If no, please add comment.

name: intended_latitude
definition: Latitude of the intended deployment location, in decimal degrees. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

name: intended_longitude
definition: Longitude of the intended deployment location, in decimal degrees. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

name: location_description
definition: Any additional description of the location.

name: log_depth_sample_period
definition: Time interval between the sample values of depth. This field is specific to VR2AR receivers. By default, sample values are not logged on the VR2AR receivers.

name: log_depth_stats_period
definition: Time interval between the recording of depth statistic, as calculated from sample values.

name: log_noise_sample_period
definition: Time interval between the sample values of noise. This field is specific to VR2AR receivers. By default, sample values are not logged on the VR2AR receivers.

name: log_noise_stats_period
definition: Time interval between the recording of noise statistic, as calculated from sample values.

name: log_temperature_sample_period
definition: Time interval between the sample values of temperature. This field is specific to VR2AR receivers. By default, sample values are not logged on the VR2AR receivers.

name: log_temperature_stats_period
definition: Time interval between the recording of temperature statistic, as calculated from sample values.

name: log_tilt_sample_period
definition: Time interval between the sample values of tilt. This field is specific to VR2AR receivers.

name: mooring_type
definition: Type of mooring to which the receiver is attached. Predefined options: "surface-buoy", "surface-wind-turbine" or "bottom-mooring".

name: protocol
definition: Protocol or protocol combination that the receiver listens to in the current deployment. Predefined options, check 'Protocols'. Send an email to info@europeantrackingnetwork.org if your protocol/receiver is missing from the table

name: rcv_project
definition: Select a network project; predefined options; new project names can only be added by administrators

name: rcv_voltage_at_deploy
definition: Voltage as reported by a receiver with this capability, as near as possible to the time of deployment.

name: receiver_id
definition: Receiver ID linked to the deployment. Composed by 'Model number'-'Serial number'.

name: recover_date_time
definition: Date and time that the equipment was recovered, in 24-hour UTC. ISO-8601 format.

name: recover_latitude
definition: Latitude where the equipment was recovered, in decimal degrees. Unless it is found a substantial distance from its expected location, this can be left blank. For failed recovery attempts, use this field to record the central latitude of the recovery sea.

name: recover_longitude
definition: Longitude where the equipment was recovered, in decimal degrees. Unless it is found a substantial distance from its expected location, this can be left blank. For failed recovery attempts, use this field to record the central longitude of the recovery sea

name: riser_length
definition: Length from the anchor to the topmost float or structure of the mooring assembly.

name: station_description
definition: Name of receiver location. The location name serves as an additional descriptive name of the receiver station. It can refer to a specific nearby point of land, town, island, or body of water that identifies this receiver location.

name: station_manager
definition: Name of the person or institution managing the location.

name: station_name
definition: Name of the station where the deployment of the receiver takes place. Related to a specific latitude and longitude.

name: sync_date_time
definition: Date and time when a receiver's clock is synchronized to correct UTC, in 24-hour UTC. ISO-8601 format.

name: time_drift
definition: Displayed difference in time between the instrument's clock and correct UTC. Note: This must be recorded in the field for Vemco model VR3 receivers when there are no detections because no log file is created under those circumstances.

name: transmit_power_output
definition: Predefined options: "Low", "Medium", "High", "Very high".

name: transmit_profile
definition: Predefined options: "Range test(random)", "Range test(90s)" or "Sync".

name: voltage_at_download
definition: Voltage during download as reported by a receiver with this capability. Note: This must be recorded in the field for Vemco model VR3 receivers because it is not contained in the log file.

name: acoustic_project_code
definition: Code of the network project linked to this detection.

name: animal_id
definition: Foreign Key linked to the Animal_ID

name: animal_moratorium
definition: States whether the animal data are under moratorium, can be "false" or "true".

name: animal_project_code
definition: Code of the animal project linked to this detection.

name: animal_project_name
definition: Title of the project linked to this detection.

name: date_time
definition: Date and time at which the tagged animal was detected at the receiver. Information from detection file.

name: deploy_date_time
definition: Date and time that the equipment was deployed, in 24-hour UTC. ISO-8601 format.

name: deploy_latitude
definition: Latitude of the location of the deployment.

name: deploy_longitude
definition: Longitude of the location of the deployment.

name: deployment_id
definition: Foreign key linked to the deployment information

name: deployment_station_name
definition: Name of the station where the detection occurred.

name: detection_file_id
definition: Technical identifier of the detection file in the database.

name: lat
definition: Latitude of receiver location. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

name: location_name
definition: Name of receiver location. Please refer to a specific nearby point of land, town, island, or body of water that uniquely identifies this receiver location.

name: long
definition: Longitude of receiver location. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

name: network_moratorium
definition: States whether the network data are under moratorium, can be "false" or "true".

name: network_project_name
definition: Title of the project linked to this detection.

name: pk
definition: Technical identifier of the detection record in the database.

name: qc_flag
definition: Identifies whether there are quality check issues for the given detection.

name: receiver_id
definition: Receiver name, composed of 'Model number'-'Serial number'. Info comes from 'Detection_table'.

name: scientific_name
definition: Scientific name of the animal that carries the tag.

name: sensor_type
definition: Type of tag sensor. Predefined options: "P", "T" or "A". P = pressure, T = temperature, A = acceleration.

name: sensor_unit
definition: Unit of measured sensor value.

name: sensor_value
definition: Value recorded by the tag sensor.

name: sensor_value_acceleration
definition: Value recorded by the acceleration sensor.

name: sensor_value_depth
definition: Value recorded by the pressure sensor.

name: sensor_value_temperature
definition: Value recorded by the temperature sensor.

name: sensor2_unit
definition: Unit of measured secondary sensor value.

name: sensor2_value
definition: Value recorded by secondary tag sensor.

name: signal_to_noise_ratio
definition: Signal-to-noise ratio. This is the difference between the background noise level and the signal level. Info comes from detection file.

name: source_file
definition: Name of the detection file.

name: station_name
definition: Name of receiver station. The station name refers to a unique location, related to a specific latitude and longitude.

name: tag_fk
definition: Foreign key linked to the tag.

name: tag_id
definition: Tag ID of the detected tag.

name: application_type
definition: The receiver context type

name: ar_battery_estimated_life
definition: Expected duration for which the battery will provide adequate power for proper functioning of the acoustic release.

name: ar_disable_code
definition: Code used to disable the release.

name: ar_enable_code_address
definition: Code used to enable the release; differs among release models.

name: ar_interrogate_code
definition: Interrogate code or code range command of the release. Used to ping a specific release, rather than send a general ping to all releases in the vicinity.

name: ar_model
definition: Model number of the acoustic release as provided by the manufacturer.

name: ar_ping_rate
definition: Ping rate of the release.

name: ar_receive_frequency
definition: Interrogate or receive frequency at which the release receives data.

name: ar_release_code
definition: Code used to release the release; differs among release models.

name: ar_reply_frequency
definition: Frequency at which the release sends data.

name: ar_serial_number
definition: Serial number of the acoustic release as provided by the manufacturer.

name: ar_tilt_after_deploy
definition: Tilt after deploy of receiver

name: ar_tilt_code
definition: Tilt code of the release.

name: ar_voltage_at_deploy
definition: Voltage reported by an acoustic release as near as possible to the time of deployment.

name: battery_estimated_life
definition: Expected duration for which the battery will provide adequate power for proper functioning of the receiver.

name: built_in_acoustic_tag_id
definition: Tag full ID of the receiver's built in tag.

name: financing_project
definition: Receiver financing project.

name: manufacturer
definition: Name of receiver manufacturer. Predefined options: "INNOVASEA", "CHELONIA", "LOTEK" or "THELMA BIOTEL". Check KNOWN MODELS

name: modem_address
definition: This field is mandatory for Vemco VR4UWM receivers. It is a three-digit code from 001 to 249, as provided by the manufacturer, that is used to communicate with the Benthos modem. For VR4 receivers manufactured prior to September 2011, the modem address is

name: op_enabled
definition: checked, when open protocol is enabled

name: order_number
definition: order number

name: owner_organization
definition: Affiliation of the Principal Investigator for the project.

name: pk
definition: Primary Key linked to the tag. This field is automatically generated by the database when a new entry is made.

name: receiver_id
definition: The receiver name is composed of 'Model number'-'Serial number'.

name: receiver_model
definition: Predefined options. Needs to match receiver in 'KNOWN MODELS'. Send an email to info@europeantrackingnetwork.org if your model is missing from the list

name: receiver_serial_number
definition: Serial number assigned by receiver manufacturer to uniquely identify receiver.

name: status
definition: Current status of receiver. Predefined options: "Available" when uploading the receivers; will automatically be set to "Active" when deployments for the receiver get uploaded; need to be manually set when: "Broken", "Lost" or "Returned to manufacturer".

name: accelerometer_algorithm
definition: There are two possible modes of operation of the accelerometer algorithm: Activity or Tailbeat.

name: accelerometer_samples_per_second
definition: Number of acceleration samples taken on each axis per second. Sampling rate can be 5 Hertz (5 measurements/s) or 10 Hertz (10 measurements/s).

name: activation_date
definition: Date and time the tag was activated, in UTC

name: battery_estimated_end_date
definition: Estimated date at which tag will stop transmitting. Date fields should follow the ISO-8601 format.

name: battery_estimated_life
definition: Estimated duration of time during which the tag will be transmitting.

name: financing_project
definition: Tag financing project.

name: frequency
definition: Frequency (in Hz) at which the tag emits a signal.

name: manufacturer
definition: Name of tag manufacturer. Predefined options: "INNOVASEA", "CHELONIA", "LOTEK", "STAR-ODDI","THELMA BIOTEL".

name: model
definition: Predefined options. Needs to match tags in 'KNOWN MODELS'. Send an email to info@europeantrackingnetwork.org if your model is missing from the list (currently all set to 'NOT YET SET')

name: owner_organization
definition: Group owner of the tag. Use the exact group name to which the tag belongs.

name: owner_pi
definition: First and last name of the Principal Investigator for the project.

name: pk
definition: Primary Key linked to the tag. This field is automatically generated by the database when a new entry is made.

name: sensor_intercept
definition: Raw value of intercept, as used for sensor calibration.

name: sensor_range
definition: Maximum range of sensor.

name: sensor_slope
definition: Raw value of slope, as used for sensor calibration.

name: sensor_transmit_ratio
definition: Ratio of transmission between sensors present. If for example both a T and P sensor are present and T transmits twice as often as P, the range is 2 to 1.

name: sensor_type
definition: Type of sensor in the tag device. Predefined options: P = pressure, T = temperature, A = acceleration, M(A) = Mortality(Alive), M(D) = Mortality(Dead), EMF, Mo = Motion

name: sensor_unit
definition: Unit of the sensor

name: status
definition: Current status of the tag. Three options: "available" when uploading the tags. Will automatically be set to "active" when animals get uploaded. Will automatically be set to "ended" when the battery estimated lifetime  is reached

name: step1_acceleration_duration
definition: Time window over which acceleration is sampled (in seconds).

name: step1_duration
definition: Duration of step 1, in days

name: step1_max_delay
definition: Maximum delay, in seconds, between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 1.

name: step1_min_delay
definition: Minimum delay, in seconds, between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 1.

name: step1_power
definition: Acoustic power level. "H" or "L".

name: step2_acceleration_duration
definition: Time window over which acceleration is sampled (in seconds).

name: step2_duration
definition: Duration of step 2.

name: step2_max_delay
definition: Maximum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 2.

name: step2_min_delay
definition: Minimum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 2.

name: step2_power
definition: Acoustic power level. "H" or "L".

name: step3_acceleration_duration
definition: Time window over which acceleration is sampled (in seconds).

name: step3_duration
definition: Duration of step 3.

name: step3_max_delay
definition: Maximum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 3.

name: step3_min_delay
definition: Minimum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 3.

name: step3_power
definition: Acoustic power level. "H" or "L".

name: step4_acceleration_duration
definition: Time window over which acceleration is sampled (in seconds).

name: step4_duration
definition: Duration of step 4.

name: step4_max_delay
definition: Maximum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 4.

name: step4_min_delay
definition: Minimum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 4.

name: step4_power
definition: Acoustic power level. "H" or "L".

name: steps_count
definition: Amount of steps

name: tag_id_alternative
definition: Converted Code

name: tag_id_code
definition: In the case of an acoustic tag or Vemco mobile transceiver, this is the identification code transmitted by the tag, which is available from the tag manufacturer.

name: tag_id_protocol
definition: Tag code space of the detected tag.

name: tag_subtype
definition: Type of acoustic tag. Predefined options: "animal", "built-in tag", "sentinel tag" or "range tag".

name: tag_type
definition: Type of tag attached to animal. Fixed options: sensor-tag, id-tag, combined-tag (=sensor-tag + id-tag)

name: telemetry_type
definition: Type of tag attached to animal. Fixed options: Id-tag or sensor-tag

name: type
definition: Type of the tag.
